name: wicked-core-ts
description: Node/TypeScript bindings (napi-rs) for wicked-core: drive the in-process orchestration engine from JS/TS.

scripts.build: cargo build -p wicked-core-ts --release && cp target/release/libwicked_core_ts.dylib index.node
scripts.build:debug: cargo build -p wicked-core-ts && cp target/debug/libwicked_core_ts.dylib index.node
